name: Lam Research / 泛林集团
summary: 泛林集团专注刻蚀、沉积和清洗设备，是先进逻辑、HBM/DRAM 和 NAND 制造链的关键设备公司，NVIDIA AI 需求通过晶圆厂和存储厂扩产传导。 / Lam Research focuses on etch, deposition, and clean tools for advanced logic, HBM/DRAM, and NAND manufacturing, with NVIDIA AI demand transmitted through foundry and memory capex.
summaryZh: 泛林集团专注刻蚀、沉积和清洗设备，是先进逻辑、HBM/DRAM 和 NAND 制造链的关键设备公司，NVIDIA AI 需求通过晶圆厂和存储厂扩产传导。
summaryEn: Lam Research focuses on etch, deposition, and clean tools for advanced logic, HBM/DRAM, and NAND manufacturing, with NVIDIA AI demand transmitted through foundry and memory capex.

business.description: 公司向半导体制造商销售晶圆制造设备、升级和服务，尤其在刻蚀和沉积环节具备强地位。 / The company sells wafer-fabrication equipment, upgrades, and services to semiconductor manufacturers, with strong positions in etch and deposition.
business.descriptionZh: 公司向半导体制造商销售晶圆制造设备、升级和服务，尤其在刻蚀和沉积环节具备强地位。
business.descriptionEn: The company sells wafer-fabrication equipment, upgrades, and services to semiconductor manufacturers, with strong positions in etch and deposition.
revenueModel: 晶圆制造设备 / wafer fabrication equipment
客户支持业务 / customer support business

business.thesis: 与 NVIDIA 的联系主要通过 HBM、先进逻辑和封装产能投资传导，属于间接上游设备敞口。 / The NVIDIA linkage runs through HBM, advanced logic, and packaging capacity investment, making Lam an indirect upstream equipment exposure.
business.thesisZh: 与 NVIDIA 的联系主要通过 HBM、先进逻辑和封装产能投资传导，属于间接上游设备敞口。
business.thesisEn: The NVIDIA linkage runs through HBM, advanced logic, and packaging capacity investment, making Lam an indirect upstream equipment exposure.
riskNotes: 存储和逻辑资本开支周期会影响订单。 / Memory and logic capex cycles affect orders.
设备交付依赖高精度部件、真空系统和特种材料。 / Tool delivery depends on high-precision parts, vacuum systems, and specialty materials.

relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in the raw-material or high-purity material layer, where expansion cycles often first create supply, qualification, or pricing constraints.

entities.name: TSMC / 台积电
entities.relationship: 先进晶圆厂客户；其先进制程扩产是设备需求的重要来源。
entities.relationshipZh: 先进晶圆厂客户；其先进制程扩产是设备需求的重要来源。
entities.relationshipEn: Advanced foundry customer; its leading-node expansion is an important source of equipment demand.
entities.customerRole: 晶圆厂客户 / 设备需求方
entities.customerRoleZh: 晶圆厂客户 / 设备需求方

relationshipStrength.label: 中相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: NVIDIA 需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂或封装投资间接传导，不等同于直接采购关系。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: NVIDIA 需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂或封装投资间接传导，不等同于直接采购关系。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: NVIDIA demand transmits indirectly through foundry, memory, or packaging investment and is not the same as a direct purchasing relationship.

entities.name: NVIDIA Corporation / 英伟达
entities.relationship: 不是典型直接客户；NVIDIA AI 芯片需求通过台积电、存储厂和先进封装投资间接拉动设备需求。
entities.relationshipZh: 不是典型直接客户；NVIDIA AI 芯片需求通过台积电、存储厂和先进封装投资间接拉动设备需求。
entities.relationshipEn: Not typically a direct customer; NVIDIA AI-chip demand indirectly drives equipment demand through foundries, memory makers, and advanced-packaging investment.

themeExposure.rationale: 刻蚀、沉积和清洗设备支撑先进逻辑与 HBM 产能，处于 AI 芯片供给链的上游扩产环节。
themeExposure.rationaleZh: 刻蚀、沉积和清洗设备支撑先进逻辑与 HBM 产能，处于 AI 芯片供给链的上游扩产环节。
themeExposure.rationaleEn: Etch, deposition, and clean tools support advanced logic and HBM capacity, placing it in the upstream expansion layer of AI chip supply.
